characters.name: Aria
characters.characterDescription: A young adult feminine presentation east asian individual. Facial structure includes a rounded jawline, high cheekbones, tapered-almond eyes, low nasal bridge, soft nose tip. Contrast features include None shadow response, None brow density, None lash definition. Skin tone is light-yellow. Hair has chin-length blunt bob with sharp horizontal cut terminating precisely at jawline with coarse-straight texture and dark-brown color. Age morphology shows smooth skin with subtle definition around the eyes and cheeks, with medium soft‑tissue volume, medium cheek fullness, light under‑eye definition, light nasolabial fold depth, smooth skin texture. Body silhouette is narrow shoulders, long slender torso, slim arms, narrow hips, slender legs, with narrow shoulders, long torso proportion, soft waist definition, narrow hips, low muscle definition.

Facial structure includes a rounded jawline, mid cheekbones, almond eyes, low-mid nasal bridge, soft nose tip. Contrast features include None shadow response, None brow density, None lash definition. Skin tone is tan-golden. Hair has chin-length blunt bob with sharp horizontal cut terminating precisely at jawline with straight texture and auburn color. Age morphology shows smooth skin with subtle definition around the eyes and cheeks, with medium soft‑tissue volume, medium cheek fullness, light under‑eye definition, light nasolabial fold depth, smooth skin texture. Body silhouette is narrow shoulders, long slender torso, slim arms, narrow hips, slender legs, with narrow shoulders, long torso proportion, soft waist definition, narrow hips, low muscle definition.
